2026-0438
2026-05-13PMOPublic Service Employment ActAppointment of a Chairperson of the Independent Advisory Board for Supreme Court of Canada Judicial AppointmentsAppointment of the Maureen McTeer of Ottawa, Ontario, to be a special adviser to the Prime Minister, to serve as a member of the Independent Advisory Board for Supreme Court of Canada Judicial Appointments, to hold office during pleasure for a term of one year; and her designation as the Chairperson of the Independent Advisory Board for Supreme Court of Canada Judicial Appointments.N/A
subject: Appointment of a Chairperson of the Independent Advisory Board for Supreme Court of Canada Judicial Appointments
precis: Appointment of the Maureen McTeer of Ottawa, Ontario, to be a special adviser to the Prime Minister, to serve as a member of the Independent Advisory Board for Supreme Court of Canada Judicial Appointments, to hold office during pleasure for a term of one year; and her designation as the Chairperson of the Independent Advisory Board for Supreme Court of Canada Judicial Appointments.
